COMPONENT.description: 🧩 Define a UI component that the agent can render in the chat.

META AVATAR.description: 👤 Set the agent's built-in avatar visual.

META IMAGE.description: 🖼️ Set the agent's profile image URL.

META COLOR.description: 🎨 Set the agent's accent color or gradient.

META LINK.description: 🔗 Provide profile/source links for the person the agent models.

META DISCLAIMER.description: ⚠️ Set markdown disclaimer text that users must agree with before chat.

META INPUT PLACEHOLDER.description: ⌨️ Set custom placeholder text shown in the chat input.

META.description: ℹ️ Set meta-information about the agent (IMAGE, LINK, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, etc.).

META VOICE.description: 🎙️ Select the ElevenLabs voice ID used for this agent.

NOTE.description: 📝 Add developer-facing notes without changing behavior or output.

NONCE.description: 📝 Add developer-facing notes without changing behavior or output.

GOAL.description: 🎯 Define the effective agent **goal**; when multiple goals exist, only the last one stays effective.

GOALS.description: 🎯 Define the effective agent **goal**; when multiple goals exist, only the last one stays effective.

INITIAL MESSAGE.description: 👋 Defines the **initial message** shown to the user when the chat starts.

USER MESSAGE.description: 🧑 Defines a **message from the user** in the conversation history.

INTERNAL MESSAGE.description: 🧩 Defines an **internal trace message** (tool calls/thinking metadata) in conversation history.

AGENT MESSAGE.description: 🤖 Defines a **message from the agent** in the conversation history.

MESSAGE SUFFIX.description: 🏷️ Set a hardcoded suffix appended to every assistant response.

MESSAGE.description: 💬 Include actual **messages** the AI assistant has sent during conversation history.

MESSAGES.description: 💬 Include actual **messages** the AI assistant has sent during conversation history.

WALLET.description: 👛 Enable persistent private credential storage (tokens, logins, cookies) scoped per agent or globally.

WALLETS.description: 👛 Enable persistent private credential storage (tokens, logins, cookies) scoped per agent or globally.

SCENARIO.description: 🎭 Define specific **situations** or contexts for AI responses, with later scenarios having higher priority.

SCENARIOS.description: 🎭 Define specific **situations** or contexts for AI responses, with later scenarios having higher priority.

DELETE.description: 🗑️ Unfinished low-level commitment for removing or disregarding information. Use carefully.

CANCEL.description: 🗑️ Unfinished low-level commitment for removing or disregarding information. Use carefully.

DISCARD.description: 🗑️ Unfinished low-level commitment for removing or disregarding information. Use carefully.

REMOVE.description: 🗑️ Unfinished low-level commitment for removing or disregarding information. Use carefully.

DICTIONARY.description: 📚 Define terms and their meanings for consistent terminology usage.

OPEN.description: 🔓 Allow the agent to be modified by conversation (default) and optionally guide the teacher.

CLOSED.description: 🔒 Prevent the agent from being modified by conversation.

TEAM.description: 👥 Enable the agent to consult teammate agents via dedicated tools.

USE BROWSER.description: 🌐 Enable the agent to use browser tools for accessing internet information.

USE DEEPSEARCH.description: 🔬 Enable the agent to use DeepSearch for more thorough internet research.

USE SEARCH ENGINE.description: 🔍 Enable the agent to use a search engine tool for accessing internet information.

USE SPAWN.description: 🧬 Enable the agent to create persistent child agents via Agents Server create-agent flow.

USE TIMEOUT.description: ⏱️ Enable timeout wake-ups plus scoped timeout listing, updates, and cancellation across chats.

USE TIME.description: 🕒 Enable the agent to determine the current date and time.

USE USER LOCATION.description: 📍 Enable the agent to determine the user location when browser permission is granted.

USE CALENDAR.description: 📅 Enable calendar tools for reading and managing events through Google Calendar.

USE EMAIL.description: 📧 Enable outbound email sending through a wallet-backed SMTP configuration.

USE POPUP.description: 🪟 Enable the agent to open a popup window with a specific website.

USE IMAGE GENERATOR.description: 🖼️ Enable the agent to output markdown image placeholders that the UI turns into generated images.

USE MCP.description: 🔌 Connects the agent to an external MCP server for additional capabilities.

USE PRIVACY.description: 🔒 Enable the agent to request turning private mode on for sensitive conversations.

USE PROJECT.description: 🧑‍💻 Enable GitHub project tools for reading/editing repository files and creating pull requests.
